Will the US stall and blame Iran for failing to negotiate or not.

My main fear remains Israeli escalation

Almost all points but the strait are given (notice Iran making no nuclear demands). 

Expect the strait to be the last pressure point and only real strong negotiation token. 

This might turn into a deal faster https://t.co/2q9UI1agXQ

tweets.text:

Wartime compensation can be unfreezing assets. 

No ballistic missiles limitations can turn into more than US wanted but less than Iran did. 

Guarantees can be given or shifted https://t.co/hZnuyoM6EZ

tweets.text:
Despite being a large energy importer by absolute amount, China is actually only dependent on 7% of its energy need from Gulf of Hormuz & 13% on oil & gas import overall.

It has the lowest oil/gas consumption as % of primary energy among the major economies. https://t.co/uFQuKfsvK7

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
ByteDance Volcano Engine's Doubao large model has now surpassed 100T token/day mark (up > 60% in past 2 months), likely boosted by Seedance 2.0.

OpenAI & Google also likely are generating > 100T/day

ByteDance token generation is mostly from China, but oversea market is growing https://t.co/4AvGMjs7Cv

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
ACEA data for Feb across all of Europe.

BYD up to 1.9% so far in 2026 & SAIC is up to 2.1%
Chery is not on this list, but it's also around 2%.
If we add in Geely & Leapmotor, Chinese brands are probably above Korean brand at this pt.

March & Apr will be interesting as petro px https://t.co/VEzBWKLGBL

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text: Another little known fact. China imported 9mt of refined oil in Jan-Feb, up 43% YoY. So it not only stocked up crude but also refined oil when px was low in advance of this energy shortage. https://t.co/L6NHXFlIA5

tweets.author: tphuang
tweets.text:
PLA's solution for mass fiber optic drone swarm is multi-layer defense w/ micro missiles, lasers & microwave.

You can see laser form 光箭-21A here shoot down multiple FPVs from several km out. The key is sensors. Unless you can get radar & EO sensor cost down, it's hard to mass https://t.co/ex0iZ0FLX3 https://t.co/6nVigumYgm
